name: WorkRemote
desc: Job board platform for remote roles with smart filters, saved searches, and real-time email alerts when new listings match your criteria.

name: DevBoard
desc: Team project management tool with drag-and-drop Kanban boards, sprint planning, and granular role-based access control.

name: ShopCore API
desc: Modular e-commerce REST API covering product catalogue, cart management, Stripe checkout, and webhook event handling.

name: Analytics Studio
desc: Interactive dashboard for product analytics — live time-series charts, funnel visualisation, and persistent custom-view configurations.

name: AuthKit
desc: Plug-and-play authentication service supporting JWT sessions, Google OAuth, passwordless magic links and TOTP-based 2FA.

name: ContentBase CMS
desc: Headless CMS with a rich-text editor, asset management, localisation support and a typed tRPC API consumed by Next.js frontends.

name: Pixel UI
desc: Open-source component library with design tokens, dark-mode support and full accessibility built on shadcn/ui primitives.

name: TaskFlow
desc: Cross-platform productivity app with offline-first sync, push reminders, recurring tasks and shared team workspaces.

name: Realtime Chat
desc: Scalable WebSocket chat service with presence indicators, read receipts, persistent message history and horizontal scaling via Redis pub/sub.
